data.body: Done definition update (adversarial review): Define a single source-of-truth artifact (e.g., `.github/required-checks.txt` or a YAML map under .github/) that lists the canonical check-context names. The Ruleset provisioner reads this file when constructing the API payload, and a CI lint step asserts every name in the file matches an actual workflow job/step that emits that context. This prevents silent name drift across d025-87d4, 792b-eb80, 4383-9234, and fc8b-aab0. Without it, GitHub matrix jobs (e.g., 'test (linux, bash4)') will not match the bare names assumed in the epic description, causing phantom required checks.
